channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump warns judge not to sacrifice national security by blocking White House ballroom and drone base
item.description: Trump criticizes Judge Richard Leon over a lawsuit blocking the White House ballroom and rooftop drone base, claiming it endangers national security.

item.title: DeSantis pushes major Florida property tax cut
item.description: Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis said Sunday he will call a special legislative session starting Monday to consider a constitutional amendment to...

item.title: Watch: Media split screen highlights New Jersey situation as Mikie Sherrill spins like a top
All 11 victims recovered after Longview mill chemical disaster
